mission.title: Install and Configure Charmed Kubernetes
mission.description: Charmed Kubernetes is a distribution of Kubernetes that is designed for easy deployment and management using Juju. It is ideal for users who want a robust Kubernetes setup with modern metrics and monitoring capabilities on Ubuntu. Key trade-offs include the need for Juju and the reliance on Ubuntu as the underlying OS.

steps.title: Install Juju
steps.description:
Juju is the tool used to deploy Charmed Kubernetes. This step installs Juju on your system.

```bash

sudo snap install juju --classic

```

> Installs the latest stable version of Juju.

steps.title: Bootstrap the Juju controller
steps.description:
This command initializes a Juju controller which will manage your Kubernetes deployment.

```bash

juju bootstrap localhost

```

> Bootstraps a Juju controller on your local machine.

steps.title: Deploy Charmed Kubernetes
steps.description:
This command deploys the Charmed Kubernetes bundle using Juju.

```bash

juju deploy charmed-kubernetes

```

> Deploys the latest version of Charmed Kubernetes.

steps.title: Verify the deployment
steps.description:
This command checks the status of the deployed services to ensure everything is running correctly.

```bash

juju status

```

> Displays the status of the deployed services.

steps.title: Configure monitoring and metrics
steps.description:
This step sets up monitoring and metrics for your Kubernetes cluster.

```bash

juju deploy prometheus-k8s

juju deploy grafana

```

> Deploys Prometheus for monitoring.
> Deploys Grafana for visualization.

uninstall.title: Remove Charmed Kubernetes
uninstall.description:
This command will remove the Charmed Kubernetes deployment and all associated resources. Be aware that this will lead to data loss.

```bash

juju destroy-controller localhost --destroy-all-models

```

> Destroys the Juju controller and all models.

uninstall.title: Clean up orphaned resources
uninstall.description:
This command ensures that any orphaned resources such as load balancers or persistent volumes are removed.

```bash

juju remove-application prometheus-k8s

juju remove-application grafana

```

> Removes the Prometheus application.
> Removes the Grafana application.

upgrade.title: Upgrade Charmed Kubernetes
upgrade.description:
Before upgrading, ensure you backup your data. This step upgrades the Charmed Kubernetes deployment.

```bash

juju upgrade-charm charmed-kubernetes

```

> Upgrades the Charmed Kubernetes charm to the latest version.

upgrade.title: Verify the upgrade
upgrade.description:
After upgrading, check the status of the services to ensure they are running correctly.

```bash

juju status

```

> Displays the status of the deployed services after the upgrade.

upgrade.title: Rollback if necessary
upgrade.description:
If the upgrade fails, you can rollback to the previous version.

```bash

juju rollback charmed-kubernetes

```

> Rolls back the Charmed Kubernetes charm to the previous version.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'juju bootstrap failed'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** This may occur if the Juju controller cannot connect to the cloud provider.

**Fix:**
Check your network settings and ensure you have access to the cloud provider.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'charm not found'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** This indicates that the specified charm is not available in the charm store.

**Fix:**
Ensure you have the correct charm name and that it is published in the Charmhub.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'juju status shows services down'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** This can happen if the Kubernetes services are not properly deployed.

**Fix:**
Run 'juju deploy charmed-kubernetes' again to redeploy the services.

troubleshooting.title: Error: 'unable to connect to the Kubernetes API'
troubleshooting.description:
**Cause:** This may occur if the Kubernetes API server is not running or accessible.

**Fix:**
Check the status of the Kubernetes control plane and ensure it is running.

versionNotes.changes: Added support for Kubernetes 1.31 features, including new API versions and improved metrics collection.
versionNotes.deprecations: Deprecated older charm versions that are incompatible with Kubernetes 1.31.
versionNotes.migrationSteps: If upgrading from 1.30, ensure to backup your data and follow the upgrade steps.

resolution.summary: You should see the output of 'juju status' showing all services as 'active' and 'running'.

prerequisites.description: Ensure you have Juju installed and your system meets the resource requirements.
